title: Procedure: Using the pH meter
author: Lalo, Avar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Laboratory procedure used in this thesis to measure pH of model fluids with the pH meter. The document describes electrode rinsing, calibration with pH 7 buffer, sample measurement, and cleaning and storage after use. This procedure is part of the thesis  Experimental Investigation of Displacement Flow in Irregular Annuli . The work was carried out at the University of Stavanger (UiS).
